chunks.text: Unexpected Power Outage at Campus Datacenter | IRIS Skip to main content Skip to primary navigation Skip to primary sidebar Unexpected Power Outage at Campus Datacenter A test of temporary generator power at the campus Data Center didn’t go well, and

ower at the campus Data Center didn’t go well, and the Data Center was shut down at about 11am this morning. This affects a number of IRIS services, such as lists.eecs (mailing lists) and IRIS apps (account and system registration requests), and is a

ccount and system registration requests), and is also having an impact on wifi authentication. Please see the Berkeley Status Dashboard for updates: https://berkeley.statusdashboard.com/event/192049/ UPDATE [2024-02-08 | larsrohr ] Campus continues t

UPDATE [2024-02-08 | larsrohr ] Campus continues to restore power to systems at the Data Center. We believe that all IRIS services are back to normal at this time. Any further updates can be found at the URL above. Resolved as of 2024-02-08 3:30pm Pr

the URL above. Resolved as of 2024-02-08 3:30pm Primary Sidebar IRIS Service Status We have 0 Active Incidents, and 1 Scheduled Maintenance noted. IST Service Status Outages to campus services are listed at berkeley.statusdashboard.com .
